verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes when I see the sun rising, I am so surprised that I'm still here. I just can′t wait to wake up in heaven, and I know that day, that day is very near.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm going, one of these mornings to a land with never a night, oh yes I'm going, one of these mornings, Wear the robe of spotless White. One of these mornings I′ll be flying high, one of these mornings I'm going to say goodbye

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes when I see the sun rising, I am so surprised that I'm still here. I just can′t wait to wake up in heaven, and I know that day, that day is very near.
